title: Totem Of Zero Two
description: changes the totem texture to the character Zero Two from the anime Darling in the Franxx
body:
### **_THIS MOD WILL NO LONGER RECEIVE UPDATES_**




**_002 Totem Resourcepack_**

**🎭 Features**
- ✅ Replaces Totem of Undying with Zero Twos’s face 🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks
- 🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing
- 🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.20+
- Join Our [Discord](https://discord.gg/d96gFRrRRX) for Support
